label: Drinks, Cheese & Tasting Pack
description: Drinks & tasting from the eater's side (A-tier): wine varietals & regions, world cheeses, craft beer, whisky, spirits, sake and liqueurs, plus gastronomy/tasting/pairing vocabulary. Bridged to the food-science production layer (fermentation, distillation).
